# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend DS select overlay fix: `DsSelectComponent` now renders its panel through `cdkConnectedOverlay` with trigger-width sync, viewport push, and transparent backdrop instead of an inline absolute panel. This fixes long dropdowns in scrollable/tabbed surfaces such as `resource-edit`, where the panel previously created an internal section scrollbar instead of overlaying the next section. Validation: `npm run build`. |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Project split generation layout was realigned: infra Bicep project generation now restores `Common/` instead of flattening shared files, mono-repo project pipelines now live under `.azuredevops/Common/...` plus `.azuredevops/{config}/...`, bootstrap YAML paths were updated to the same structure, and the Angular project-detail trees were updated accordingly. Validation: `dotnet build .\src\Api\InfraFlowSculptor.Application\InfraFlowSculptor.Application.csproj`, `dotnet test tests/InfraFlowSculptor.GenerationParity.Tests` (with intentional golden regeneration), `npm run typecheck`, `npm run build`. |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend DS forms migration wave 3 (7 commits `ed8c1f9`..`6cd06e8`): ~216 `<mat-form-field>` migrated to `<app-ds-text-field>` / `<app-ds-textarea>` / `<app-ds-select>` across 25+ files (dialogs, stepper wizards, `add-resource-dialog` 62 fields, `resource-edit.component.html` 75 fields). `MatFormFieldModule` / `MatInputModule` / `MatSelectModule` / `MatOptionModule` removed from imports where all fields were converted. Pattern: `formControlName` for FormGroup, `[ngModel]+(ngModelChange)+[ngModelOptions]="{standalone:true}"` for one-off signal-based inputs. 4 `<mat-form-field>` intentionally kept (matAutocomplete x2 in `push-to-git-dialog` + `add-project-member-dialog`, viewChild ElementRef cursor manipulation x2 in naming-template dialogs). Constraints lost: HTML `min`/`max`/`maxlength` on number inputs (form validators still apply). i18n known trap: `TranslateService.instant()` captures labels at construction, not reactive on lang switch — accepted MVP trade-off. Build green. |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend DS sweep wave 2 (3 commits): wave 2a `18cca05` migrated 4 shared dialogs (`confirm-dialog`, `cascade-delete-dialog`, `edit-abbreviation-dialog`, `generation-diagnostics-dialog`) and `add-storage-service-dialog` to `<app-ds-button>`, plus tokenized 24 gradients in `resource-edit.component.scss` and 13 in `config-detail.component.scss`. Wave 2bc `f2266b2` migrated 19 more primary CTAs across `add-app-setting-dialog` (3), `add-app-config-key-dialog` (3), `add-role-assignment-dialog` (2), `resource-edit` (3 storage submits), `add-resource-dialog` (4 stepper CTAs), `add-cross-config-reference-dialog` (1), `config-detail` (saveConfigTags), `project-detail` (saveProjectTags), `generation-board` (onGenerateAll). Total wave 2: 28 buttons + 37 gradients. Remaining out-of-scope: `add-config-dialog` (uses `form="add-config-form"` which DsButton cannot forward), `resource-edit:466 save-password-btn` (layout-specific class), and ~30 categorical `rgba()` gradients used as semantic status surfaces (each unique, not worth dedicated tokens). |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend upgraded Angular 19 → 20 → 21 (4 commits on `fix/generation-pipelines`): `provideZonelessChangeDetection` rename, Material/CDK v20 + v21 sass migrations, `tsconfig` lib es2022, control-flow migration removed redundant `CommonModule` imports across 18 components, Dockerfile bumped to Node 22 LTS + nginx 1.29-alpine with BuildKit cache mount + HEALTHCHECK + gzip + 1y immutable cache headers. DS adoption sweep wave 1: added `$ifs-gradient-card-soft` token, replaced 22 inline gradients across 8 SCSS files with brand/cta/login/brand-soft/card-soft tokens, migrated 14 dialogs from `<button mat-flat-button color="primary">` to `<app-ds-button>` (resource-edit, config-detail, project-detail). SSR explicitly OUT of scope (high risk for B2B SaaS with MSAL, near-zero SEO benefit). Forms already typed Reactive — Signal Forms deferred (dev-preview in v21). |
| 2026-04-24 | dev | Frontend DS V2 landed (8 CVA form controls, global Material override, first page migrations, showcase expansion), Angular warning cleanup removed the redundant non-nullish fallback and stale standalone import warnings, and SplitInfraCode project Bicep generation switched to a flat shared-file layout with matching frontend tree rendering. |
| 2026-04-23 | dev/copilot | Major multi-repo + generation wave: backend audit fixes (path traversal guard, auth on generation/download, security headers, HSTS, rate limiting, validator sweep, `ValidationBehavior` cleanup, unique role-assignment index, KeyVault FK `SetNull`), layout-driven repository topology (`LayoutPreset`, per-config `LayoutMode`/`InfraConfigRepository`), removal of legacy `GitRepositoryConfiguration` / `RepositoryMode` / `CommonsStrategy` / `RepositoryBinding`, SplitInfraCode dual-repo generation/push and flat Bicep layout, bootstrap ADO pipelines/environments/permissions guidance, many Bicep/pipeline correctness fixes (RBAC grouping and service category, constants union, KV secret ordering, mono-repo PR `Common` checkout, app pipeline split/promote flows, path normalization), frontend multi-repo switcher/push dialog/i18n/storage/SQL/ACR/custom-domain refinements, the local DB repair script, and the ACR RBAC deployment prerequisite note. |
| 2026-04-22 | copilot | Custom domains were implemented end to end; bootstrap Azure DevOps was hardened and documented; mono-repo combined push, existing-resource generation verification, pipeline variable usage fixes, Container App health probes and grouped Bicep parameters, CAE Log Analytics security hardening, DNS-based name availability, resource abbreviation overrides, SQL Server fixes, favicon refresh, snapshot seeding, and Aspire updates all landed. |
| 2026-04-21 | copilot | Bicep generation hardening added secure parameter support, pipeline override wiring, output symbol validation, LAW fallback logic, artifact path sanitization, and module reference disambiguation. |
| 2026-04-20 | copilot | Infra release artifact flow was standardized around `drop` and artifact-relative paths, and the Aspire MCP detection mismatch was documented. |
| 2026-04-17 | copilot | `.bicepparam` files switched to environment short names for filenames while keeping full environment names inside the file payload. |
| 2026-04-16 | copilot | Cross-cutting platform alignment landed: sealed enum value objects, string DTO ids, `.ProducesProblem(401)`, tag limits, shared role-assignment domain service, repository naming cleanup, camelCase Bicep identifiers, ErrorOr handling alignment, and Aspire decoupling of API DbContext/OTel/health wiring. |
| 2026-04-15 | copilot | `main` was merged into the DDD branch, concrete `AzureResource` aggregates were sealed, and audit automation plus GitHub audit issues were refreshed. |
| 2026-04-14 | copilot | Audit automation gained Windows-friendly PowerShell entry points, UTF-8 reads, and no longer requires PowerShell 7. |
| 2026-04-13 | copilot | Draw.io architecture tooling was added and the main architecture diagram was refreshed. |
| 2026-04-04 | copilot | Generation/pipeline stabilization fixed Azure DevOps release issues, unified app pipeline generation into `POST /generate-pipeline`, moved `AgentPoolName` to `Project`, refactored `BicepAssembler`, and corrected FK cascade behavior. |
| 2026-04-03 | copilot | App pipeline generation, GitNexus integration, and several Container App runtime/pipeline fixes landed. |
| 2026-04-02 | copilot | The assigned user-managed identity flow was refactored across domain, CQRS, Bicep, frontend, and diagnostics. |
| 2026-04-01 | copilot | Windows-first conventions were reinforced and general-config i18n/runtime issues were cleaned up. |
| 2026-03-31 | copilot | Event Hub namespace support and the configuration keys UX redesign landed. |
| 2026-03-30 | copilot | ACR pull role assignments, pipeline variable groups, Unit of Work behavior, and domain quality conventions were introduced. |
| 2026-03-29 | copilot | Azure DevOps pipeline YAML generation support was added around `AzureResourceManagerConnection`. |
| 2026-03-28 | copilot | Unified generation UX, mono-repo pipeline support, secret/static app settings, and the architect agent were introduced. |
| 2026-03-27 | copilot | UAI grouping and Storage Account CORS/lifecycle editing were improved. |
| 2026-03-26 | copilot | Storage Account CORS UX and queue/table Bicep generation were redesigned. |
| 2026-03-24 | copilot | Log Analytics Workspace and Application Insights were delivered end to end. |
